prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Mercedes-AMG M256 E30 DEH LA** 3.0L inline-6 hybrid powertrain (modified from the stock Vision Maybach 6's electric-only setup) with a **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbocharger, achieving 850 HP and 950 Nm of torque via a **Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ ECU reflash** and **Precision Turbo & Engine 76mm wastegate** for optimized boost control at 2.2 bar peak pressure.

Installation of a **Brembo GT-R 6-piston monobloc caliper** front brake kit with **420mm carbon-ceramic rotors** (upgraded from the stock 400mm setup) and **Pagid RS29 racing brake pads**, paired with **H&R 20mm lowering springs** and **Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers** for chassis rigidity and track-ready damping.

Integration of a **Mercedes-AMG GT Black Series-spec 8-speed MCT transmission** with a **South Bend Clutch Stage 4 twin-disc clutch** and **Penske 8760-series adjustable differential** to handle the increased torque, alongside a **Vibrant Performance 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system** with **Akrapović Racing catalytic converters** for backpressure optimization.
estetica: Application of a **Rocket Bunny V6 Cabriolet-widebody kit** (custom-fabricated for the Maybach 6's dimensions) with **carbon fiber fender flares** and **dual-layered PPF (XPEL Stealth) for paint protection**, featuring a **3M Matte Graphite wrap** on the lower body panels.

Installation of **HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels** in a **22x11.5 front / 22x12.5 rear** staggered setup with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (305/25R22 front, 325/25R22 rear)** and **BBS LM center-lock adapters** for a motorsport-inspired stance.

Custom **Maybach 6-specific aero package** including a **Vorsteiner carbon fiber front splitter** with **active Gurney flaps**, **Rear diffuser from the Mercedes-AMG Project ONE**, and **LED headlights retrofitted with Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs** for enhanced visibility, paired with a **Brabus Shadow Line grille** in black chrome.
